rules.name: Required fields non-empty (non-Total rows)
rules.description: For rows where Function is NOT 'Total (All)' and NOT 'Total (Core Operations)', all required fields must be non-empty after trimming whitespace.
rules.messageTemplate: "{Column}" must not be empty for non-Total rows.
rules.fixSuggestion: Fill in a valid value for "{Column}". This column is mandatory for all non-Total rows.

rules.name: Total rows: core fields still validated
rules.description: For Total rows (Function = 'Total (All)' or 'Total (Core Operations)'), YearMonth and Function must be non-blank. All other columns are allowed to be blank. When ShoringRatio is non-blank on a Total row, its format is still validated per R-SR-001.
rules.noteOnShoringRatio: If ShoringRatio is non-blank on a Total row, validate format and range per R-SR-001.

messageTemplates.yearMonthBlank: "YearMonth" must not be empty even for Total rows.
messageTemplates.invalidWhenPresent: "{Column}" value "{Value}" is present but invalid on a Total row.

rules.name: Cost Center Number: 7-digit numeric
rules.description: Cost Center Number must be exactly 7 digits (0-9 only).
rules.messageTemplate: "Cost Center Number" must be exactly 7 digits (e.g., 1234567). Got: "{Value}".
rules.fixSuggestion: Check the Cost Center Number. It must be a 7-digit number with no spaces or letters.

rules.name: YearMonth: YYYYMM format with valid month
rules.description: YearMonth must be exactly 6 digits in YYYYMM format; month portion (last 2 digits) must be 01–12.
rules.messageTemplate: "YearMonth" must be in YYYYMM format with a valid month (01–12). Got: "{Value}".
rules.fixSuggestion: Change to a 6-digit string like 202501 (year=2025, month=01).

rules.name: Owner: non-empty
rules.description: Owner must not be blank after trimming whitespace. Covered by R-REQ-001 for non-Total rows; retained as explicit rule for per-rule reporting.
rules.fixSuggestion: Enter the responsible owner name in the Owner column.

rules.name: Numeric columns: must be a number
rules.description: All numeric columns must contain a parseable numeric value when non-blank.
rules.fixSuggestion: Replace with a valid numeric value (integer or decimal).

rules.name: Numeric columns: must be ≥ 0
rules.description: All numeric columns must be zero or positive.

rules.name: ShoringRatio: strict percent format, 0%–100%
rules.description: ShoringRatio must use a strict percentage format: a non-negative integer or decimal followed immediately by '%'. Whitespace is trimmed before validation. The numeric part must be in the range [0, 100] inclusive. Applies to all rows; on Total rows only validated when non-blank.
validationSteps: 2. If blank: skip (blank is caught by R-REQ-001 for non-Total rows; allowed blank for Total rows).
4. Strip trailing '%', convert to number n.
rules.messageTemplate: "ShoringRatio" must use percent format with a value between 0% and 100% (e.g., 23%, 12.5%). Got: "{Value}".
rules.fixSuggestion: Change the value to "number%" format, e.g., 25% or 12.5%. Do not use 0.25 or 25 without the % sign.

rules.name: Function: must be in whitelist
rules.description: Function value must match one of the approved entries in the function whitelist.
rules.messageTemplate: "Function" value "{Value}" is not in the allowed list.
rules.fixSuggestion: Choose a valid Function from the approved whitelist.

rules.name: Team: must be in whitelist
rules.description: Team value must match one of the approved entries in the team whitelist.
rules.scope: non-Total rows where Team is non-blank
rules.messageTemplate: "Team" value "{Value}" is not in the allowed list.
rules.fixSuggestion: Choose a valid Team from the approved whitelist, or contact the admin to add a new team.

rules.name: (Function, Team) combination must be allowed
rules.description: The combination of Function and Team must exist in the approved mapping table.
rules.scope: non-Total rows where both Function and Team are non-blank
rules.messageTemplate: Function "{Function}" + Team "{Team}" is not an allowed combination.
rules.fixSuggestion: Check the Function-Team mapping table and correct either the Function or Team value.

rules.name: Monthly coverage: expected (Function, Team) combinations present
rules.description: For each YearMonth, the set of (Function, Team) combinations must match the expected full set.
rules.messageTemplate: YearMonth {YearMonth}: expected combination Function="{Function}" / Team="{Team}" is missing.
rules.fixSuggestion: Add the missing row for the specified Function and Team in YearMonth {YearMonth}.
